pkgmetadata.longdescription: This is a set of Python bindings for the libcups library from theCUPS project. Example of getting a list of printers import cups conn cups.Connection () printers conn.getPrinters () for printer in printers... print printer, printers[printer][device-uri]...HP ipp192.168.1.1631printersHPduplex ipp192.168.1.1631printersduplexHP-LaserJet-6MP ipp192.168.1.1631printersHP-LaserJet-6MPEPSON-Stylus-D78 usbEPSONStylus20D78
